form.formComment: Last start 2nd over 2875m at this track beaten 2.7m by Lizao Du Guesclin in 5yo race on March 15. Two runs back unplaced over 2800m at Chartres well beaten by Lia De La Mortrie in 5yo race on March 1 at $3.70. Impossible to entertain.

form.formComment: Last start 5th over 2450m at Caen beaten 12m by Lady Fairy in 5yo mare race on March 30 at $16. Before that, a good run when 2nd over 2675m at Lisieux, beaten 1.3m by Laeken De La Motte in 5yo mare race on March 14 at $5.10. Capable of taking this out.

form.formComment: Capable of better than we have seen lately. Last start 12th (25m) over 2800m at Pontchateau beaten 85m by Love Kills in 5yo handicap on February 15 at $84. The run previous 5th over 3000m at Nantes beaten 53m by Legende D'eole in 5yo mare race on January 12 at $57. Expecting a spike in form this time.

form.formComment: Returns after five months in the paddock. Finished off last campaign when well beaten into seventh behind Let Me Sixty One at Marseille-Borely over 3000m in a 4yo A handicap on November 14 at $60. Makes plenty of appeal.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into sixth behind Lynx Du Ruisseau at Maure-de-Bretagne over 2850m in a 5yo race on March 24 at $26. Then a handy effort when beaten by 2.8m finishing third behind Lady Fairy at Caen over 2450m in a 5yo mare race on March 30 at $16. Nicely placed to take this out.
